start.speaker: Uncle Fadez
start.text: Ah! Come in, come in! Sit down! ...Wait. You're the one talking to our spiritual consultant. Grotty Green is under CONTRACT, bro.

mood_variants.crash: Nobody's coming in for trims today. Market's dead. And now YOU show up? Wallahi...
mood_variants.boom: Business is beautiful, bro! Everyone wants a fade! But YOU... you're bad for business.

options.text: Spiritual consultant? She's a person, not a contractor.
Contract? Show me the paperwork then.
I just want a trim, mate. That's all.
[Hustle Knowledge 5+] What's your margin on the holy sessions? I can do better.

moral_objection.speaker: Uncle Fadez
moral_objection.text: A person?! Bro, she does spiritual healing for a THOUSAND men at a time! That's not a person, that's a FRANCHISE! My cousin built the booking website! It's got FIVE STARS!

options.text: Five stars from who? Your other cousins?
This is really messed up, you know that?

cousin_network.speaker: Uncle Fadez
cousin_network.text: My cousins are REAL CUSTOMERS, bro! They attended EVERY session! Very spiritual! Very... intensive! RD4, cuz! The whole family supports the programme!

options.text: I'm going to pretend I didn't hear any of that.
Your entire family business is based on spiritual massages and skin fades?

proud_of_it.speaker: Uncle Fadez
proud_of_it.text: DIVERSIFICATION, bro! Fades on top, holy sessions on the side! My accountant says I'm a genius! ...My accountant is also my cousin, but STILL!

options.text: I respect the hustle, even if it's completely mental.
I'm leaving before I lose more brain cells.

no_paperwork.speaker: Uncle Fadez
no_paperwork.text: Paperwork?! It's a HANDSHAKE DEAL, bro! In our culture — well, not OUR culture specifically, more of a... REGIONAL tradition — a handshake is worth more than paper! RD4 for life, cuz!

options.text: So you've got nothing. Cool.
Maybe I can broker something. What do you actually want?

nothing_threat.speaker: Uncle Fadez
nothing_threat.text: NOTHING?! I've got TWELVE barber chairs and FORTY-SEVEN cousins! You think that's nothing?! Next time you need a fade, you'll be BEGGING! Nobody does a skin fade like the Trim Kings!

options.text: I'll take my chances at the Tesco self-checkout with some clippers.
Alright, I'm going. Enjoy your... empire.

just_a_trim.speaker: Uncle Fadez
just_a_trim.text: JUST a trim?! Nobody comes here for JUST a trim! This is a NETWORKING EXPERIENCE! ...But since you're here. Number two on the sides? While I explain why you should STAY AWAY from our consultant?

options.text: Fine. Trim and a lecture. How much?
Actually, I'll pass.

trim_price.speaker: Uncle Fadez
trim_price.text: Fifteen quid. And FREE life advice: Grotty Green is OFF LIMITS. She does holy massages for US. A thousand men! Spiritual healing! Big field! Very legitimate!

options.text: Fifteen for a trim in Consett? You're the real scammer here.
Sure. Nice fade by the way.

business_talk.speaker: Uncle Fadez
business_talk.text: Now THAT'S business talk, bro! We take 35% of holy session revenue. Green does the... spiritual work. We handle marketing, logistics, cousin distribution. What's your offer?

options.text: I take 20%, you keep 25%, Green gets more. Everyone wins.
Actually, I think I'd rather just shut the whole thing down.

business_talk_fail.speaker: Uncle Fadez
business_talk_fail.text: Margins? MARGINS? Bro, do you even know what a margin is? My cousin studied economics at YouTube University! Don't come in here with words you don't understand!

options.text: YouTube University. Obviously.

doesnt_care.speaker: Uncle Fadez
doesnt_care.text: Messed up? BRO! It's TRADITION! Well... relatively new tradition. Started last year. But it's IMPORTANT! Skin fade AND spiritual healing! The two pillars of civilisation!

options.text: I can't with this place. Goodbye.

respect_hustle.speaker: Uncle Fadez
respect_hustle.text: SEE! He gets it! RD4, cuz! Tell you what — I'll give you a loyalty card. Ten fades, one free. Just stay away from Green's calendar, yeah? We've got sessions booked through AUGUST.

options.text: Deal. Give me the card.
I'll take the card, but I'm still talking to Green.

insult_fight.speaker: Uncle Fadez
insult_fight.text: RIGHT! THAT'S IT! Boys! Get the hot towels! The SCALDING ones! Nobody disrespects the Trim Kings! My cousin's cousin trained in COMBAT BARBERING!

options.text: [FIGHT] Combat barbering? I've got to see this.
[RUN] I suddenly have an appointment literally anywhere else.

leave_trim.speaker: Uncle Fadez
leave_trim.text: Go then! But remember — the Trim Kings never forget a face! Especially when we've SHAPED it! RD4 for life, cuz!

options.text: Noted.
